subject: Oleana, corporate executive figure in a fitted red and white dress, standing confidently in a sleek modern interior
description: A figure in a form-fitting red and white dress stands poised in a clean modern interior space, posture upright and controlled. The figure holds something at their side, expression composed and imperious. The background is minimal and architectural — pale walls, geometric lines suggesting a corporate or institutional setting. The overall tone is cool and authoritative.
foreground: corporate woman in red and white dress, poised stance
